violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, deli slicer, veggie cutters) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment to be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The vents above pizza oven were observed with an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The doors to the outside observed left open at the time of this inspection. Establishment shall install a screen to prevent insects from entering the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. 6-202.14 Toilet Rooms, Enclosed. Completely enclosed toilet facilities minimize the potential for the spread of disease by the movement of flies and other insects between the toilet facility and food preparation areas. -Except where a toilet room is located outside a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT and does not open directly into the FOOD ESTABLISHMENT such as a toilet room that is provided by the management of a shopping mall, a toilet room located on the PREMISES shall be completely enclosed and provided with a tight-fitting and self-closing door. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Establishment is lacking a dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment shall replace ceiling with tiles that are smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
The walls in the dining area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. All holes shall be sealed/covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
